{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320150048B5222860CAC118DD914B"}"},"total":5},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7597834497632944958","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好听细节描写非常棒"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769011452,"group_id":"7588200769958972478","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwefnh2yPhYbsTRWDkwrP+8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"51414947444","user_name":"佛罗勒斯岛的江狄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"51414947444","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7588200769958972478","book_info":{"abstract":"黄金修罗？不，这一次，我叫他们跪下！
我曾是龙国最年轻的兵王“黄金修罗”，境外暗网标注“遇见即死”。如今却被剥夺一切被黑白两道追杀。
“重组‘利刃’，揪出影子里的杂碎。”
我以为这是复仇，却在首次任务遭遇精准伏击。濒死的队员、发送坐标的上级终端、樱花国口音的狞笑“你母亲的戒指，配你未婚妻的墓碑。来东京，你父亲在你母亲旁边等你。”
原来我不是猎手，是1998年昆仑实验最成功的“作品”。信任的战友是内鬼，指引的上级是叛徒，追寻的父亲或为元凶。
那就来吧。让“影子”里的鬼、东京的“园丁”看看：黄金修罗的刀专斩魑魅，钻石兵王的火烧穿寒冬！
看点提示
极致悬疑内斗：人人可疑，任务简报即死亡通知，战友微笑藏刀；
身份反转烧脑：从“叛徒之子”到“实验体”，每层真相颠覆认知；
热血战友情：绝对阴谋中淬炼的信任，“后背交给你”是最硬的浪漫；
都市兵王体系：从列兵到传奇，权限碾压+技能克制，爽感拉满；
强强联合：法学系女友用法律思维破局，心理博弈撕开伪装，并肩作战是爱情最好的样子。
这一次，不问对错，只斩仇寇。影子？在我面前，你也配藏？！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe08c77444d30a65c64fb4a534168b74f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"隐藏的白金大神","author_id":"","book_id":"7588200769958972478","book_name":"兵王孤狼：开局被开除军籍","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3234人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7588200886480929342","read_count":"3234","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"828221"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"250","tags":"都市日常,都市,无敌,特种兵","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9cfaddc7d100a99b53e91b79293eb0c6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779174048&x-signature=bYHgHjgDk27zcSizN3Acl1ZfYK8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1626865763625015","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"29"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320150048B5222860CAC118DD914B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":18535,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21690,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":183},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":
